2604.08368.title: SOLAR: Communication-Efficient Model Adaptation via Subspace-Oriented Latent Adapter Reparametrization
2604.08368.paper_summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods, such as LoRA, enable scalable adaptation of foundation models by injecting low-rank adapters. However, their communication and storage costs remain a major bottleneck in resource-constrained settings. We propose SOLAR (Subspace-Oriented Latent Adapter Reparameterization), a post-training compression framework that substantially reduces the communication cost (i.e., the number of parameters to transmit or store) of PEFT adapters. SOLAR expresses each PEFT update as a linear combination of basis vectors formed from the foundation model's singular vectors with controlled random perturbations. By exploiting the subspace similarity (the alignment of principal directions) between the foundation model and task-specific fine-tuned updates, SOLAR decouples the adapter size from PEFT structure and ensures compact yet expressive representations. It is model-agnostic and compatible with existing PEFT methods, including LoRA, AdaLoRA, and other adapter modules. We theoretically establish a bound on the reconstruction error. Experiments on language and vision tasks using LLaMA, GPT, and ViT models demonstrate that SOLAR preserves task performance while significantly reducing model representation sizes, offering an effective and communication-efficient solution for deployment in distributed systems and edge devices.
2604.08368.paper_summary_zh: 參數高效微調（PEFT）方法，如 LoRA，通過注入低秩適配器來實現基礎模型的可擴展適應。然而，它們的通信和存儲成本在資源受限的環境中仍然是一個主要瓶頸。我們提出了 SOLAR（子空間導向潛在適配器重參數化），這是一個後訓練壓縮框架，顯著降低了 PEFT 適配器的通信成本（即傳輸或存儲的參數數量）。SOLAR 將每個 PEFT 更新表示為基於基礎模型的奇異向量和受控隨機擾動形成的基向量的線性組合。通過利用基礎模型與任務特定微調更新之間的子空間相似性（主方向的對齊），SOLAR 將適配器大小與 PEFT 結構解耦，並確保緊湊而富有表達力的表示。它是模型無關的，並且與現有的 PEFT 方法兼容，包括 LoRA、AdaLoRA 和其他適配器模塊。我們從理論上建立了重建誤差的界限。在使用 LLaMA、GPT 和 ViT 模型的語言和視覺任務上的實驗表明，SOLAR 在顯著減少模型表示大小的同時保持任務性能，為在分佈式系統和邊緣設備上的部署提供了一個有效且通信高效的解決方案。
2604.08368.author: Seyed Mahmoud Sajjadi Mohammadabadi et.al.
2604.08368.authors: Seyed Mahmoud Sajjadi Mohammadabadi, Xiaolong Ma, Lei Yang, Feng Yan, Junshan Zhang
